title: Nike Have a Beautiful Run
description: We were tasked with creating a social-first campaign to celebrate Eliud Kipchoge's unique outlook on running. The campaign also coincided with his fifth Berlin Marathon and the launch of his own Nike running collection.

title: Nike Kids Move
description: As part of Nike's 'Play New' initiative we were asked to create a campaign to encourage kids of all abilities to dance. We created 'the move challenge', where every dance move submitted was turned into a fun character by YONK.

title: Nike Never Fade
description: After the success of Nothing Beats a Londoner, we were tasked with encouraging the city's teens to engage with Nike running and buy some shoes. Nike had just released the Vaporfly 4% — a shoe that could actually stop you 'fading out' on a run.

title: Nike Rundown
description: Nike asked us to create a campaign that would make young people living in the city take notice of Sir Mo Farah's London Marathon participation. The collaboration involved Michael Darah running mile for mile with Mo.

title: Nike LDNR — Nothing Beats a Londoner
description: Nike & W+K were in the process of creating a huge film for London. I was tasked with blowing the idea out 360 degrees, across social and beyond.

title: Nike WWC 2019 — Wall of Dreams
description: 2019 women's world cup and Nike wanted to start to build a new generation of footballing heroes. We created a poster campaign that was launched on the bedroom walls of young girls all around the globe.

title: Nike Hypervenom II — Deceptive by Nature
description: My first ever freelance gig at W+K London. I was partnered up with Cal Al-Jorani to write a campaign for a new Nike football boot called the Hypervenom II.

title: Nike Like a Lioness
description: We worked with Nike to create a platform for the England Women's Team. One that would encourage girls to engage with football during the World Cup, and beyond.

title: Nike We Run With It
description: Nike asked us to develop a new running platform just for London. We launched the platform on Peckham Rye Lane with fly-posters and a takeover of shops, shutters and paving slabs.

title: Nike Human Race
description: We prepared a win reactive campaign for Eliud Kipchoge's fourth Berlin Marathon. Not only did he win, but he also smashed his own world record.

title: Nike Own The Floor
description: Nike are big in the dance world. But, as a brand, they have never given dance the 'Nike treatment'. We created a huge cinema, social and OOH campaign for Europe, Middle-East and Africa. One that finally put dancers front and centre.

title: Nike Berlin — Never Done
description: A city attack to coincide with the 2022 Berlin Marathon. We worked with local running clubs and photographer Jeramy Soma to create a massive social, print and OOH campaign.

title: Camden Fresh Tour
description: Camden Town Brewery wanted to encourage drinkers to ditch their usual beer and try Camden. We roped in Jammer BBK and Blink Inc to create the ultimate brewery tour.

title: Camden Recall
description: Camden Town Brewery never pasteurise their beer. That's why it tastes fresh as hells. They asked us to come up with an idea that would make people care about this unique USP.

title: F1 Welcome to the Edge
description: Each year, at the start of the F1 season, we were tasked with creating a launch film and identity. 'Welcome to the Edge' helped launch the 2020 Grand Prix. Alongside the launch film, we developed a tool to help F1 recreate our 'edge' film treatment themselves.

title: F1 Racing Reborn
description: The 2022 F1 season ushered in the biggest changes to the sport in a decade. New rules breathed new life into top tier motor racing.

title: Sainsbury's Home is Christmas
description: COVID was hitting us all hard, so Sainsbury's tasked us with creating a Christmas campaign that didn't feel too excessive or big budget.

title: McDonald's Canada Family
description: W+K needed someone to step up and creative direct a film for McDonald's Canada. I raised my hand and helped create this sweet little spot with director Alex Hulsey.

title: National Art Fund — Miss Nothing
description: The National Art Pass is a membership service that gives entry to galleries, museums and exhibitions. A promotional film was created for London featuring collaborators Ian Pons Jewell, Lily Newmark and Joanna Lumley.

title: Bud Light Boxheads
description: Bud Light were the official beer of the England men's team. They wanted to find a way to shout about this on their packaging. We also created a load of reaction GIFs for fans to use during big international games.

title: Lurpak Hope
description: I worked with Tom Bender and Tom Corcoran to write this spot for Lurpak. I didn't end up creating the final film, but I did manage to carve out a brand new job title for myself: 'Creative Support'.

title: Paddy Power 2012–2015
description: At Crispin Porter + Bogusky I spent three years working on the Paddy Power account, both as a writer and a creative director. We produced loads of great work in that time and had a lot of fun.

title: Turkish Airlines Fly Africa
description: At Crispin Porter + Bogusky I spent some time working on Turkish Airlines. It turns out they fly to more destinations in Africa than any other airline.

title: Grolsch Big Bold
description: I've included this campaign from 2010 because I am really proud of the interactive elements we developed. The films were also beautifully shot and still look fantastic all these years later.
